raw_consumer_statement: XX/XX/XXXX I received notification of a possible fraudulent transaction. I immediately called citi and spoke with their representative that it was indeed fraud. They issued me a new credit card number and I assumed it was taken care. Citi sent me photos of a fake ID used that was not my picture and a fake credit card. It was not a " double cash '' card like they know my card is. In spite of this, they have concluded that I'm held liable for this transaction today, XX/XX/XXXX. They already drafted the $ XXXX.
